jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer - Backend
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p>Lookout’s mission has remained the same: to secure mobile endpoints with the world’s leading Mobile EDR + ZTNA platform across phishing-and-content-protection (PCP) longitudinal-telemetry data.</p></div><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Senior Software Engineer partners with Engineering & Product to ship the Mobile EDR core that powers Lookout’s cybersecurity platform.</p>

jobs.title: Enterprise Account Development Representative
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p>Lookout’s mission has remained the same: to secure mobile endpoints with the world’s leading Mobile EDR + ZTNA platform across phishing-and-content-protection (PCP) longitudinal-telemetry data. The Sales team owns the B2B Lookout enterprise mobile-security pipeline.</p></div><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Enterprise Account Development Representative partners with Sales Engineering and Customer Success to grow the Lookout Mobile EDR enterprise footprint across Fortune 1000 cohorts.</p>
